name: unifi-access
description: Manage UniFi Access — doors, users, door groups, PIN/NFC credentials, activity logs, and access schedules.

UNIFI_HOST.description: Hostname or IP of your UniFi Access controller (e.g. https://192.168.1.1 or https://unifi.local)

UNIFI_VERIFY_SSL.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates. Set to false for self-signed certs (typical in homelabs)
